question.zh: VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？
question.en: What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?

options.zh: 为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据
options.en: Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data

options.zh: 如何把显示器做得更大
options.en: How to make a monitor larger

options.zh: 为什么所有数据集都有相同标签
options.en: Why all datasets have the same labels

options.zh: 如何从学习中去掉概率
options.en: How to remove probability from learning

explanation.zh: VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。
explanation.en: VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior.
